name: Buttered Rum Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Cream butter; gradually add 2-1/2 cups sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Combine flour and baking soda; add to creamed mixture alternately with sour cream, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix just until blended after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla extract and lemon extract.
5. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold egg whites into the batter.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes; remove from the pan, and place on a serving plate.
10. While warm, prick cake surface at 1-inch intervals with a wooden pick; pour Buttered Rum Glaze over the cake.
